title: Junior Business Development Manager at WeWork India

jsonLd.title: Junior Business Development Manager at WeWork India
jsonLd.description:
WeWork India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Business Development Manager for our Bhopal operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About WeWork India:
WeWork India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with WeWork India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
